name: foundry
description: Bootstrap an AI-assisted engineering setup into any repo: specs, gherkin features, vitepress docs, kanban board, glossary contract, gates, COE-driven evals.

interface.shortDescription: Bootstrap an AI-assisted engineering setup into any repo
interface.longDescription: Foundry installs spec-driven development, executable Gherkin features, a VitePress doc site, a tracked kanban board, a glossary-as-contract, verification gates, and COE-driven eval accretion — wired to your stack and verified working. Foundry ships the mechanisms; your repo supplies the content.
